metadata.description: Private GitHub Copilot plugin marketplace for development workflow skills

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Structured development workflow skills — impl-dispatcher (help), impl:code (classify → plan → branch → baseline → implement → test → Opus review → maintenance), impl-docs (one-shot doc edits), impl-jira (Jira-driven feature docs and Epic drafting), fix-vuln (CVE remediation), upgrade (dependency upgrades), api-guideline-reviewer, and guideline-reviewer. Twenty-seven skills total: seven orchestrators, nineteen sub-agents (risk-planner, code-review, doc-reviewer, epic-reviewer, test-baseliner, test-writer, review-fixer, doc-fixer, docs-style-checker, doc-planner, doc-location-finder, jira-reader, diff-summarizer, code-scanner, impl-maintenance, vuln-research, vuln-fixer, upgrade-planner, upgrade-executor), and one dispatcher. Three notification/context hooks.

plugins.name: dt-style-guide
plugins.description: Dynatrace corporate style guide checker and writing-aid plugin. Enforces terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, formatting, and inclusive-language rules from styleguide.dynatrace.com. Includes dt-review-pr (review PR doc changes), dt-review-docs (review files/directories with optional --fix), dt-style-refresh (update vendored rules), a dt-style-checker sub-agent, a dt-doc-fixer sub-agent, a dt-style-rules skill, and eight vendored reference docs. Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter is available.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Eleven skills (wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-scan, wiki-query, wiki-save, wiki-lint, wiki-hot, wiki-tags-refresh, wiki-schema, wiki-task, wiki-tasks-extract) for ingesting, querying, saving, linting, and managing a persistent wiki compiled from meetings, projects, and daily notes. Includes task management: create individual tasks and batch-extract tasks from wiki content.
